_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Conflicting signals between fearful sentiment and elevated momentum/funding keep price in anxiety chop with no clear resolution until either fear deepens to confirm a flush or sentiment recovers to shift toward Hope.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls HOLD with low conviction citing divergences; narrative implies upside resolution toward relief rally, creating a directional split the judge resolves toward the analyst's caution
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 20 with btc_momentum_30d rolling over below 45 and funding collapsing toward 35
next_move.invalidated_if: fear_greed climbs above 35 with btc_momentum_30d sustaining above 50 and DXY breaking below 100
